name: The Legend of Tickets
name_jp: <ruby lang="jp"><rb>Ｔｈｅ Ｌｅｇｅｎｄ ｏｆ Ｔｉｃｋｅｔｓ</rb><rp> (</rp><rt>ザ・レジェンド・オブ・チケット</rt><rp>)</rp></ruby>
desc: Target 1 card in your GY; place it on top of the Deck during the End Phase of this turn, also draw 2 cards instead of 1 for your normal draw during your next Draw Phase. You can only activate 1 "The Legend of Tickets" per turn.
eff: Target 1 card in your GY; place it on top of the Deck during the End Phase of this turn, also draw 2 cards instead of 1 for your normal draw during your next Draw Phase. You can only activate 1 "The Legend of Tickets" per turn.

action: Places cards from the player's Graveyard on the top of the Deck
